channel.title: BAND-MAID Social Mentions
channel.description: BAND-MAID mentions from across social media.

item.title: [BlueSky] 多来点BAND-MAID 和 The Warning这种合作好吗……人活着就是要看这种乐队活儿
item.dc:creator: WineHusk/酒壳 (sld07.bsky.social)
item.description:
多来点BAND-MAID 和 The Warning这种合作好吗……人活着就是要看这种乐队活儿
打死我也想不到在别的圈接触的墨西哥姐妹乐队和动画OP认识的乐队居然会合作，梦幻

BlueSky · sld07.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Band-Maid have put a teaser for their new song Energetic on YouTube. I heard ...
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
Band-Maid have put a teaser for their new song Energetic on YouTube. I heard this tune on their world tour 2026 and it's a banger.

www.youtube.com/shorts/cKmZP...

BlueSky · roboto-chan.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] I put more clips of the Band-Maid show in London up on YouTube.
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
I put more clips of the Band-Maid show in London up on YouTube.

It's going to be a while before I see them live again, especially as they are taking next year off 😭

youtu.be/WWV_Tv36lNw

BlueSky · roboto-chan.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] e Thrill, each of us separately looked for a direction that would match Band-...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
e Thrill, each of us separately looked for a direction that would match Band-Maid®, but we decided our musical direction through Thrill and united together, which was really important. Each of us changed our approach in sound making.

Misa (bass): Since all of us are technique-oriented, we like our

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] — By the way, which BAND-MAID songs can you play relatively easily?
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
— By the way, which BAND-MAID songs can you play relatively easily?

KANAMI: Maybe “Thrill” is the easiest to play?

Saiki: Isn’t “FREEDOM”?

Miku: No.

MISA: Eh?

AKANE: The degree of difficulty depends on which part you play (laughs)
--------------------

— The first trigger that made you greatly

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.dc:creator: MAGMOE (magmoe.bsky.social)
item.description:
JOURNEY、NIGHT RANGER、LOUDNESS、BAND-MAID等出演の音楽イベント”THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA”、タイムテーブル公開！

https://www.magmoe.com/3041544/music/2026-06-18/

8月29日にみずほPayPayドーム福岡にて開催される”THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA”（通称：フクロック）のタイムテーブルが公開された！　　JOURNEY、NIGHT RAN [...]

item.title: [BlueSky] One OK Rock is such a Band where i am still surprised that they're Songs were...
item.dc:creator: Tao Of Chaos (taoofchaos.bsky.social)
item.description:
One OK Rock is such a Band where i am still surprised that they're Songs were never featured on Anime Openings since they have the Style and Power for that and Band-Maid on the other Hand were already featured in some Anime OPs 😁

BlueSky · taoofchaos.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Funny Thing is Passcode and Band-Maid i know thx to the Youtube Algorithm yea...
item.dc:creator: Tao Of Chaos (taoofchaos.bsky.social)
item.description:
Funny Thing is Passcode and Band-Maid i know thx to the Youtube Algorithm years ago and One OK Rock i know because they were used back in a Trailer for the Devil May Cry made by Ninja Theory and since then i am a Fan 😁

BlueSky · taoofchaos.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Well then is now your first Chance 😎 also loving that they also put Passcode...
item.dc:creator: Tao Of Chaos (taoofchaos.bsky.social)
item.description:
Well then is now your first Chance 😎 also loving that they also put Passcode, Band-Maid and One OK Rock on it so that more people can hear them 😁

BlueSky · taoofchaos.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Who wants to give me a couple million to put together a big concert that goes...
item.dc:creator: Kenny McMillan (kwmcmillan.bsky.social)
item.description:
Who wants to give me a couple million to put together a big concert that goes Drug Church > Band Maid > Queens of the Stone Age?

I swear I can make it happen.

BlueSky · kwmcmillan.bsky.social

item.description:

item.title: [BlueSky] ／

item.description:
／
🔊コラム連載：これのドラムを聞け！5秒だけでもいい
＼
AKANE（BAND-MAID）のテンションが爆上がりする曲は🥁

「私の周りのドラマーも、もちろん私もたくさんコピーしました」
https://natalie.mu/music/column/674873?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#bandmaid

BlueSky · music.natalie.mu

item.title: [BlueSky] Hugely grateful that I got to see BAND-MAID live in London, I just wish that ...
item.dc:creator: OBiW4NSHiNOBi (obiw4nshinobi.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hugely grateful that I got to see BAND-MAID live in London, I just wish that H could have been there with me. They were every bit as good as I had hoped, plus genuinely funny & charismatic.

There was some drama with a couple of people collapsing (it was awfully hot) but glad they were ok. #bandmaid

BlueSky · obiw4nshinobi.bsky.social

item.title: [Mastodon] Hugely grateful that I got to see BAND-MAID live in London, I just wish that ...
item.dc:creator: OBiW4NSHiNOBi (OBiW4NSHiNOBi)
item.description:
Hugely grateful that I got to see BAND-MAID live in London, I just wish that H could have been there with me. They were every bit as good as I had hoped, genuinely funny & charismatic.

There was some drama with a couple of people collapsing (it was overcrowded & awfully hot) but glad they were ok; the band's concern was palpable.

H did ask me to take as many pictures as I could, but I couldn't take my camera in & I didn't want to be one of those guys watching the gig through a phone. https://mastodon.social/tags/bandmaid

Mastodon · OBiW4NSHiNOBi

item.title: [BlueSky] BABYMETALとかBANDMAIDとか花冷え。とか、日本国内のアワード受賞なんかにまったくかすらない面々が海外フェスで活躍しまくってるのは、本当に頼も...
item.dc:creator: 老熊 (anoldbearjpn.threads.net.ap.brid.gy)
item.description:
BABYMETALとかBANDMAIDとか花冷え。とか、日本国内のアワード受賞なんかにまったくかすらない面々が海外フェスで活躍しまくってるのは、本当に頼もしいと思う。世界中のにーちゃんねーちゃんおっちゃんおばちゃんに直に届いてるのは、こういうバンドなんよ。

BlueSky · anoldbearjpn.threads.net.ap.brid.gy

item.title: [BlueSky] MUSIC AWARDS JAPANへの不満を投稿しているところに、DOWNLOAD FESTIVAL終わりのBANDMAIDの投稿が流れてきた。それでいい。

BlueSky · mayonakamidnighter.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Je ne sais pas si ça peut t’intéresser pour le revoir, mais le concert comple...
item.dc:creator: Julie 🏳️‍⚧️ (kurenaiju.bsky.social)
item.description:
Je ne sais pas si ça peut t’intéresser pour le revoir, mais le concert complet a été posté sur youtube.

En tout cas, ta setlist matche avec ce qui a été posté

BlueSky · kurenaiju.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Je m'excuse sincèrement pour n'avoir pas posté plus tôt ce compte-rendu.
item.dc:creator: Xavier F. (fxmaccobra.bsky.social)
item.description:
Je m'excuse sincèrement pour n'avoir pas posté plus tôt ce compte-rendu.
Le temps de tri des photos + des retouches a été plus long que prévu.
L'éclairage pendant le concert de BAND-MAID était souvent faible et avec des lumières rouges, cela a pas mal compliqué le travail. ⤵️

BlueSky · fxmaccobra.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Après l’entracte au cours duquel on installe les instruments, c'est enfin l'e...
item.dc:creator: Xavier F. (fxmaccobra.bsky.social)
item.description:
Après l’entracte au cours duquel on installe les instruments, c'est enfin l'entrée des temps attendues BAND-MAID sous les acclamations du public.
A peine les artistes sont en place que le show commence. Et on démarre très fort avec le très énergique titre "DOMINATION".
Les soubrettes vont enchainer⤵️

BlueSky · fxmaccobra.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Retour sur le concert du groupe #BANDMAID au #Bataclan le 09/06/2026:
item.dc:creator: Xavier F. (fxmaccobra.bsky.social)
item.description:
Retour sur le concert du groupe #BANDMAID au #Bataclan le 09/06/2026:

J'arrive vers 17h30 et ayant pris un pass VIP, cherche pour m'enregistrer.
Je vois 2 longues files d'attente et on m'indique qu'une est dédiée aux VIP.
Je vais donc en queue de ma file et attend.
Curieusement, aucune indication ⤵️

BlueSky · fxmaccobra.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Still getting over seeing Band-Maid on Thursday night. They were incredible.
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
Still getting over seeing Band-Maid on Thursday night. They were incredible.

I know it's a long way for them to travel but I would love to see them in the UK more often.

That being said, I don't mind flying to Japan to catch a show. I've done the four day round trip before and I'll do it again 🤘

BlueSky · roboto-chan.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] this heaviness is becoming another uniqueness of Band-Maid.
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
this heaviness is becoming another uniqueness of Band-Maid.

Kanami: The perfect limited edition is a double album with the two concepts “Return to the roots” and “Progress from the present”, and Manners is a song to bridge them. That’s why it’s included in both discs. There are many masters and pr

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Went to see BAND-MAID live. Some of their songs include the OP themes to Rock...
item.dc:creator: Kikoman589 ☀️ (kikoman589.bsky.social)
item.description:
Went to see BAND-MAID live. Some of their songs include the OP themes to Rock Is a Lady's Modesty and Platinum End but they made a lot of other good tracks. It was fun. Here's a bit of "Ready to Rock" and then "Unleash!!!!!".

[Flashing lights; audio only on the right for some reason]

BlueSky · kikoman589.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 🎥 Our REACTION is live! 🔹 The fierce chemistry between the band members.
item.dc:creator: AngelTalion (angeltalion.bsky.social)
item.description:

Band-maid reaction, reaction video, reaction videos, reaction channel, music reaction, band-maid reaction, band-maid live reaction, band-mai…

item.title: [BlueSky] jooyeon from xdinary heroes has shown up in two of my fics now - he's got a c...
item.dc:creator: skrr! 🎸 (holdmyhandnow.bsky.social)
item.description:
jooyeon from xdinary heroes has shown up in two of my fics now - he's got a cameo in you already know and he's jisung's band's bassist in some sorta chemistry (the drummer is akane from band-maid) haha

BlueSky · holdmyhandnow.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] BAND-MAID were absolutely incredible live. I started listening to them after ...
item.dc:creator: Lavender Courage (lavendercourage.bsky.social)
item.description:
BAND-MAID were absolutely incredible live. I started listening to them after Rock Lady came out and they sang the OP. Getting to experience their talent in person was out of this world.

BlueSky · lavendercourage.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] BAND-MAID last night was a very fun time. Because their music is good you for...
item.dc:creator: Matthew Jennifer Tinn (onosume.bsky.social)
item.description:
BAND-MAID last night was a very fun time. Because their music is good you forget they are a band that wears maid costumes but they definitely have a quirky vibe live.

BlueSky · onosume.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] So, is it the first Band-Maid song about loneliness and weakness of a girl in...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
So, is it the first Band-Maid song about loneliness and weakness of a girl in love?

Miku: Yes. It’s about weakness and also about getting suspicious. Also, in this song, we emphasize our twin vocals more than usual and I sing the octave above.

— Is it the lead song and a new frontier at the same

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] rics with Sai-chan. We Band-Maid have had many lyrics with an image of a stro...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
rics with Sai-chan. We Band-Maid have had many lyrics with an image of a strong woman until now, but as for Alone, Sai-chan wanted to express also a woman’s weakness, and I wrote such lyrics. When Sai-chan said “This part is not right”, I rewrote it and showed it to my bandmates again and again.

—

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Band-Maid returned to the UK last night after a seven year absence , playing ...
item.dc:creator: Keith Sowerby (jamesksowerby.bsky.social)
item.description:
Band-Maid returned to the UK last night after a seven year absence , playing to a modest 1500 people at the Electric Brixton. Featured here is a conversation piece between bassist MISA and drummer Akane. It constitutes your Friday Brekkie tune

item.title: [BlueSky] Rock is a Lady's Modesty introduced me to this five year old song and my brai...
item.dc:creator: 🏳️‍⚧️ Bog Witch Girl 🏳️‍⚧️ (bogwitch-girl.bsky.social)
item.description:
Rock is a Lady's Modesty introduced me to this five year old song and my brain is fixated on it now

I'm so proud of Tina for playing this to, as the girls rather explicitly say, whip out her cock too

www.youtube.com/watch?v=oTFH...

here's to a season 2 with BAND-MAID performing again in... 2029?

BlueSky · bogwitch-girl.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] to: We had talked about wanting a song like that at the meeting, and since it...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
to: We had talked about wanting a song like that at the meeting, and since it has been said for some time that there are almost no songs that can be called ballads in BAND-MAID, we had hoped to take this opportunity to make one such song. The timing of the tour coincided with the U.S. tour, and KANA

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] MISA: As my tension rises while playing myself I think all the songs are tens...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
MISA: As my tension rises while playing myself I think all the songs are tension rising. I especially like the ballad [anemone]. I love the melody and listen to it more than 5 times a day even now.

KANAMI: When I made the demo of [anemone], there was talk on this may not be a typical BAND-MAID tune

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social
